synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23464 Oracle Linux 8 tzdata bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23464
description:
[2025c-1.0.1]
- Use javac 1.6 or newer

[2025c-1]
- Update to tzdata-2025c (RHEL-135159)
  - Update leap seconds file expiration date

[2025b-2]
- Included NEWS file with docs. (RHEL-102379)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23464

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23464.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
tzdata-2025c-1.0.1.el8.noarch.rpm
tzdata-java-2025c-1.0.1.el8.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
tzdata-2025c-1.0.1.el8.noarch.rpm
tzdata-java-2025c-1.0.1.el8.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/tzdata-2025c-1.0.1.el8.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2025c-1.0.1]
- Use javac 1.6 or newer

[2025c-1]
- Update to tzdata-2025c (RHEL-135159)
  - Update leap seconds file expiration date

[2025b-2]
- Included NEWS file with docs. (RHEL-102379)
